notableEvents.label: Jacob Wilson GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jacob Wilson grounds into a double play, shortstop J.P. Crawford to second baseman Cole Young to first baseman Josh Naylor. Tyler Soderstrom out at 2nd. Jacob Wilson out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Pitcher Emerson Hancock picks off Lawrence Butler at 2nd on throw to second baseman Cole Young.

notableEvents.label: Max Muncy plunked
notableEvents.detail: Max Muncy hit by pitch. Carlos Cortes to 3rd. Jeff McNeil to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: With Zack Gelof batting, Lawrence Butler picked off and caught stealing 2nd base, shortstop J.P. Crawford.

notableEvents.label: 2 straight HRs
notableEvents.detail: Back-to-back (or more) homers in one game

notableEvents.label: Rob Refsnyder pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Rob Refsnyder flies out to center fielder Denzel Clarke.
